sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Aircraft Flight Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls aircraft movement in vertical scrolling space. Eight different playable characters representing four nations with distinct aircraft types (F/A-18, F-14, FSX, F-15, Viggen, Gripen, Harrier II, Tornado IDS)

physics_values.notes: No specific flight physics parameters documented

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Button 1 fires normal weapons upgradeable via P items and rare F items with hidden ammo cap. Button 2 launches special attack limited by collected B items (2 per life start)

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. As a vertical scrolling shmup (not platformer), traditional jump physics, gravity, and sub-pixel movement parameters are not applicable. Game focuses on aircraft flight mechanics and weapon systems rather than character physics. SNES port noted to suffer from slowdown according to GamePro review.
notes: Game is a vertical scrolling shooter paradigm, not a platformer. Physics parameters extraction was not applicable as the game mechanics center on aircraft movement in a scrolling space rather than traditional platform movement with jump, gravity, and walk mechanics. TCRF source header contained security notice and was not substantive for movement data.
